dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Haste
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Movement Speed increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Haste
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Movement Speed increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Elegant Reply
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, you have a 30% chance to reflect 5% of the damage back to the attacker. This effect may only occur once every 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Wanderer's Vigor
dbEquipBonuses.description: When not in a party, you regenerate 3% of your Maximum Hit Points, up to 3000, every 3 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pilgrim (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 1% for every enemy you faced when starting combat, to a max of 10% for 10s. If facing only one enemy at start, the bonus is +5% for 1 minute. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Wanderer's Vigor
dbEquipBonuses.description: When not in a party, you regenerate 3% of your Maximum Hit Points, up to 3000, every 3 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pilgrim (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 1% for every enemy you faced when starting combat, to a max of 10% for 10s. If facing only one enemy at start, the bonus is +5% for 1 minute. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Dash
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Movement Speed increases by 1% for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pioneer (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You gain an increased stat for each party member. Party of 1: +200 Power. 2: +400 Power+Defense. 3: +400 Power+Defense+Accuracy. 4: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike. 5: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike+Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Dash
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Movement Speed increases by 1% for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pioneer (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You gain an increased stat for each party member. Party of 1: +200 Power. 2: +400 Power+Defense. 3: +400 Power+Defense+Accuracy. 4: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike. 5: +800 Power+Defense+Accuracy+Critical Strike+Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Executioner's Zeal
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, you gain 3% Action Points.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Executioner's Zeal
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, you gain 3% Action Points.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 250 Combat Advantage for each enemy you are engaged in battle with. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: The Ol' Switcheroo
dbEquipBonuses.description: +7.5% Incoming Healing, -10000 Accuracy.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Spelljammer's Fortified Ally
dbEquipBonuses.description: -2% Incoming Damage and 2.5% Incoming Healing in Wildspace. -1% Incoming Damage and 2.5% Incoming Healing in non-Wildspace.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Critical Resilience
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 3.8% Awareness and Deflect while at full health. These bonuses decrease relative to your missing health.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Healer's Influence (Greater)
dbEquipBonuses.description: Healing an ally also heals you for 80,000 and grants you and close Allies 3% Defense for 3s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Defender Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Base Damage Boost when struck. Stacks 5 times. When you strike an enemy, the stacks are consumed and you gain -1% Incoming Damage per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Spider's Bane
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 4,500 Power in the Underdark and gain more role effectiveness when in the Temple of the Spider. DPS: +5% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -5% Incoming Damage. Healer: +5% Overall Outgoing Healing.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Critical Resilience
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain up to 5% Critical Avoidance and -2.5% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Critical Resilience
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 4.5% Awareness and 4% Deflect while at full health. These bonuses decrease relative to your missing health.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Shared Vitality
dbEquipBonuses.description: Healing an ally has a 40% chance to grant you and your nearest ally +3% Critical Strike and +3.5% Critical Severity for 10 seconds. (15 second cooldown)
